name: Mercenaries 2 Lua Mods
description: Lua-driven mods for Mercenaries 2. The Lua Bridge runtime plus menu widgets, script tools, and other content designed to be composed by scripts running on top of it.

mods.name: Lua Bridge
mods.description: Live Lua REPL, script loader (OnBoot / OnLoad / OnKey), full keyboard/focus API, math stdlib parity, persistent SaveVar/LoadVar, and a self-healing watchdog. The runtime layer every [LUA]-prefixed mod in this catalog depends on. Ships as one .asi plus companion config + Python REPL client; drop them into <game>/scripts/.

mods.name: [LUA] Menu Widgets
mods.description: Five reusable menu movie assets (forge, cbar, cpanel, contracts, chat) that Lua scripts call via SetSwfFile(). Adds new WAD entries under bare-name keys; overrides nothing. Requires the Lua Bridge runtime and a script that drives the menus.
